title: Kindergarten Math
description: Kindergarten math curriculum aligned to the Texas Essential Knowledge and Skills (TEKS). Focus on counting, recognizing numbers, simple shapes, comparing sets, and basic addition/subtraction within 10.

units.title: Counting & Numbers to 20
units.summary: Count, read, and write numbers to 20.

lessons.title: Counting objects to 10
lessons.objective: Count a set of objects up to 10.
